title: Specify capability.yaml
description: Validates the structure of a Specify capability manifest. The manifest is the declarative surface the core loads before running the slice loop. Defined by RFC-13 §Capability manifest and protocol; the field set is closed (additionalProperties: false) so the dropped fields domain, extends, and pipeline.plan are actively rejected rather than tolerated.

name.description: Capability identifier in kebab-case (e.g. omnia, contracts, vectis). Must match the directory name under capabilities/.

version.description: Major capability version. Increments when the capability ships breaking pipeline or contract changes.

description.description: Human-readable, single-sentence summary of the capability's outcome domain.

pipeline.description: Ordered briefs the core renders for each fixed slice phase. RFC-13 deliberately forbids a `plan` entry here: planning is platform-component territory and is owned by `specify change`.

define.description: Ordered briefs for the define phase. At least one brief is required.

build.description: Ordered briefs for the build phase. At least one brief is required.

merge.description: Ordered briefs for the merge phase. At least one brief is required.

id.description: Brief identifier in kebab-case. Must be unique within the manifest and must match the brief file's frontmatter id.

brief.description: Path to the brief markdown file, relative to the capability manifest. Must not be an absolute path or a URI.
